completed_steps.description: Fix P1: TypeScript .tsx → split into TS + TSX providers
Fix P2: JS lexical_declaration → constrain @const to 'const' keyword
Fix P1: C variable declarations → add plain decl pattern
Fix P1: file_id collision → path-based hash
Fix P1: Ruby → add scope_resolution patterns
Fix P2: C# → remove implicit_object_creation pattern
Add process tracing (entry point → BFS call chains)
Add BM25 search (SQLite FTS5 + hybrid graph proximity)
Fix get_symbol O(n) → O(1) via symbols_by_id HashMap
Restructured scan pipeline: separate file discovery from parallel parsing
Phase 1: parallel directory scan collects file contents into LocalAccum
Phase 2: parallel parse distributes files across threads, each with own SyntaxEngine
No race conditions: each thread owns its own Parser, content is read-only shared via &
